exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),2) ELSE trim(o.OwnerId) END AS AgentId,
  SUM(CAST(trim(oi.Quantity) AS REAL) * CAST(trim(oi.UnitPrice) AS REAL)) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON (
  CASE WHEN substr(trim(oi.OrderId),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(oi.OrderId),2) ELSE trim(oi.OrderId) END
) = (
  CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.Id),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.Id),2) ELSE trim(o.Id) END
)
WHERE date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),2) ELSE trim(o.OwnerId) END AS AgentId,
  SUM(CAST(trim(oi.Quantity) AS REAL) * CAST(trim(oi.UnitPrice) AS REAL)) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON (
  CASE WHEN substr(trim(oi.OrderId),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(oi.OrderId),2) ELSE trim(oi.OrderId) END
) = (
  CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.Id),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.Id),2) ELSE trim(o.Id) END
)
WHERE date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;
